title: stelis tanythrix
intro: Stelis tanythrix, also known as the Antillean Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the Caribbean and Central America. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Stelis tanythrix can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
